title: Old Piston Sounds
description: Bring back the old Piston Sounds as they have been changed in 1.21 Snapshots
body:
# Old Piston Sounds

Brings back the old Piston Sounds prior version 1.21

What?
- Mojang changed the sounds from when a piston extends/retracts to a quieter, less attenuated version. This Resourcepack brings back the old Sound.

Why?
- Legacy. The old sounds have been in the game for so long, it seems odd to replace them with something new...
